mapper.select: SELECT r.*, a.title as activity_title, s.real_name as staff_name FROM activity_registration r LEFT JOIN activity a ON r.activity_id = a.activity_id LEFT JOIN retired_staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE r.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY r.reg_time DESC

SELECT r.*, a.title as activity_title, s.real_name as staff_name FROM activity_registration r LEFT JOIN activity a ON r.activity_id = a.activity_id LEFT JOIN retired_staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE r.staff_id = #{staffId} ORDER BY r.reg_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_registration (activity_id, staff_id, reg_time, group_name) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{staffId}, NOW(), #{groupName})
